MNY Photo
Work

Weddings — editorial coverage with quiet confidence

A cinematic blend of documentary moments and refined portraiture — crafted for galleries that feel timeless, not trendy.

  • Best for: couples who value story + style
  • Includes: timeline guidance, calm direction, curated edits
  • Deliverables: full gallery + highlights
Explore ServicesCheck Availability

Branding — images built to sell with restraint

On-brand visuals for founders and teams — clean, warm, and high-end. Art direction included.

  • Best for: founders, studios, service brands
  • Includes: shotlist + styling guidance
  • Deliverables: web-ready set + crop kit
See PackagesStart a Brief

Events — fast, flattering, unobtrusive

Conference, gala, and brand event coverage with a polished, editorial finish — delivered on schedule.

  • Best for: activations, press moments, culture
  • Includes: hero + candid + details
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + PR selects
How It WorksRequest Coverage

Studio portraits — sculpted light, clean direction

A refined studio look with warm highlights and smooth shadows — perfect for headshots and editorial portraits.

  • Best for: executives, creatives, actors
  • Includes: guided posing
  • Deliverables: selects + retouched finals
Studio OptionsBook a Session

Family + lifestyle — honest, elevated, unrushed

Simple prompts, natural movement, beautiful light — made for homes, not hard drives.

  • Best for: families, couples, milestones
  • Includes: wardrobe + location guidance
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + print-ready files
Session GuideRequest Dates

Commercial — campaign-ready details

Product and lifestyle images designed for performance — sharp, warm, and intentional.

  • Best for: launches and seasonal campaigns
  • Includes: art direction
  • Deliverables: hero set + variants
Commercial PackagesRequest a Quote

Contact Us

Who we are

A boutique studio approach — calm direction, cinematic finish.

MNY Photo is built for clients who care about story and detail. We keep the process simple, the energy calm, and the work exceptionally made.

Inquire See the work

Brand story

Photography that feels like memory — with an editorial edge.

The best images don’t shout. They hold attention. Our approach is built on clean framing, warm contrast, and an experience that helps you feel present.

Values

Warmth. Clarity. Craft.

Warmth over trends

A look that lasts — and feels like you when you revisit it years later.

Calm direction

Clear prompts and gentle pacing so you can relax into the moment.

Details are the story

Hands, texture, light — the small things that make the memory feel real.

Finish that reads expensive

A cohesive gallery with premium black & white and consistent color.

Approach

Documentary honesty, editorial composition.

We’ll create space for real moments — then guide you into portraits that feel effortless.

Explore work Work together

Client experience

We keep it simple — and beautifully handled.

Before

Planning guidance, shotlist support, and wardrobe notes.

During

Calm prompts, clean framing, and moments captured without disruption.

After

Curated edits, premium black & white, and delivery built for sharing.

Editing philosophy

Retouching that keeps you human.

We refine what distracts, preserve what’s real, and finish with warm contrast and clean skin tones.

Ready when you are

Let’s create a gallery that feels like you — elevated.

Share your date, location, and what you’re building. We’ll respond with availability and next steps.

Send an inquiry Browse resources
